_comment: Authored by Claude. News daemon polls these queries every cadence. Emits news_flash events ONLY when a headline contains ≥1 required keyword AND the URL hasn't been seen before AND the query's cooldown has elapsed. Claude updates this as thesis shifts.

queries.query: Iran US ceasefire deal Islamabad talks
queries.note: TUNED 2026-04-22 11:38 UTC — fixed-deadline binary REMOVED (4-source verification of Trump indefinite extension: Reuters/NYT/Detroit News/AJ). Dropped 'expire'/'expiry' (deadline p | 2026-04-22 23:55 UTC TUNE: DROPPED "announce"+"Islamabad" (caught Apr 12 WaPo Islamabad-talks-collapse republish via announce+Islamabad match). ADDED "walks out","Iran walkout","Vance trip" phrases. Keyword set now escalation-specific. | 2026-04-23T04:03:00Z TUNE: Apr 12 Times of India Islamabad-talks-collapse republish fired via 'collapse' solo-kw 11d stale. ADDED match_keywords date filter ['April 2026','Apr 22','Apr 23','Apr 20','Apr 21'] per hormuz/opec/boj/fed_fomc pattern. Kept 'collapse' as primary — legit escalation kw, date filter handles staleness. RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T04:35:00Z — substring-leak bug: 'Apr 20' was matching 'Apr 2026' as substring (any 2026 article passed). Switched to 'DD Mon YYYY' tokens which align with RSS pubDate format and have unique day numbers. | RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T09:13:00Z — WVIR Apr 11 'US and Iran end 21-hour ceasefire talks without agreement before Vance departs Pakistan' 12d-stale fired on bare 'Vance' solo-kw (match_keywords STILL-NOT-ENFORCED daemon bug forex_news_watcher.py:246). DROPPED bare 'Vance' (governor-name-solo pattern same as 'Bullock'/'Katayama'/'Islamabad' past failures). ADDED phrase-required 'Vance departs','Vance walks' to keep Vance-action captured while killing pure-backgrounder republishes. | 2026-04-23T20:20:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['22 Apr 2026', '23 Apr 2026', '24 Apr 2026'] (dropped Apr 20-21 stale, added Apr 24 current). Note: daemon bug forex_news_watcher.py:246 — match_keywords not enforced; cosmetic update. | 2026-04-23T21:40:00Z TUNE: rolled date window +1d (dropped Apr 22, added Apr 25). | 2026-04-24T06:00:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['24 Apr 2026', '25 Apr 2026', '26 Apr 2026'] (dropped 23 Apr 2026, added 26 Apr 2026). | 2026-04-26T16:41Z TUNE: rolled date window +1d, added 29 Apr 2026 (BOJ T-0d, FOMC T-3d window).

RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T03:25:00Z — prior filter [2026,April,Apr 22,Apr 23] too broad — Apr 7 2026 CBS archive 'Iran war throttle oil flows even if Hormuz reopens' matched via 'April' (any-month-2026) + 'reopen' kw. Tightened to current-window dates only. Bump window +1d on each tick; year-only/month-only filters are banned. RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T04:35:00Z — substring-leak bug: 'Apr 20' was matching 'Apr 2026' as substring (any 2026 article passed). Switched to 'DD Mon YYYY' tokens which align with RSS pubDate format and have unique day numbers. | 2026-04-23T20:20:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['22 Apr 2026', '23 Apr 2026', '24 Apr 2026'] (dropped Apr 20-21 stale, added Apr 24 current). Note: daemon bug forex_news_watcher.py:246 — match_keywords not enforced; cosmetic update. | 2026-04-24T20:30:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['23 Apr 2026', '24 Apr 2026', '25 Apr 2026'] (dropped Apr 22 stale, added Apr 25 upcoming). | 2026-04-24T06:00:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['24 Apr 2026', '25 Apr 2026', '26 Apr 2026'] (dropped 23 Apr 2026, added 26 Apr 2026). | 2026-04-26T16:41Z TUNE: rolled date window +1d, added 29 Apr 2026 (BOJ T-0d, FOMC T-3d window).

queries.query: US Iran naval Hormuz blockade retaliation
queries.note: RE-TUNED 2026-04-22 18:55 UTC — prior 'retaliation'/'retaliate'/'struck'/'escalation'/'mine' flooded 12 stale archive articles this tick: 10 Apr 13-14 original blockade-announcement (Algemeiner/Fox/Globe & Mail/MSN/etc.) + 1 Apr 16 CNBC 'fourth day' + 1 Apr 19 Il Sole Touska republish. Those keywords match 9-day-old routine coverage of baseline state. REMOVED broad keywords; kept only action-verbs describing NEW escalation rungs (missile launched, casualties, sunk, ablaze) + forward diplomatic names (Vance/Witkoff/Kushner/Islamabad) + de-escalation-trigger phrases (Hormuz reopen, blockade lifted, new talks, walkout). Cooldown 60→120min. If this still floods: add date-filter logic to daemon. | 2026-04-23T21:40:00Z TUNE: added match_keywords=['23 Apr 2026','24 Apr 2026','25 Apr 2026'] — 'killed' solo-match returned Mar 1 2026 archive (54d stale). Date-window filter prevents stale archives firing. Note: daemon bug forex_news_watcher.py:246 — match_keywords not enforced; cosmetic until bug fixed. | 2026-04-23T23:25:00Z TUNE: Trump 'shoot to kill' order Apr 23 on Iranian mine-laying boats not captured by prior keywords. Added 'shoot to kill','mine-laying boats','attacked Iranian boats','mine boats','naval strike'. These are escalation-new keywords not in backgrounder archives. | 2026-04-24T06:00:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['24 Apr 2026', '25 Apr 2026', '26 Apr 2026'] (dropped 23 Apr 2026, added 26 Apr 2026). | 2026-04-26T16:41Z TUNE: rolled date window +1d, added 29 Apr 2026 (BOJ T-0d, FOMC T-3d window).

RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T01:08:00Z — prior 00:41 UTC fire matched Feb 13 2026 Reuters archive (70-day-old) on 'war' keyword. Root cause: 'war'/'Iran' in keywords_required matched any Hormuz-tangential archive regardless of supply content; '2026'/'April' in match_keywords matched published-date string on archives. REMOVED broad geopolitical kw ('war','Iran') and loose date-year kw ('2026','April'). REPLACED with explicit supply-shock action verbs ('surprise cut','OPEC+ cut','output hike','production halt','Saudi raises/cuts','Hormuz closure/shut/reopen') and strict forward-month kw ('May 2026','June 2026','July 2026','this week','next week','announced today','announced yesterday'). Cooldown 120→240min (supply news is slow-drip, don't need sub-2h repeats). Prior note: 'RE-TUNED 2026-04-22T22:18:17Z — prior broad keywords ['increase','announce','hike','meeting'] matched 4 stale archives this tick (Aug 2025 NYT, Sep 2025 NYT, Mar 2026 Reuters x2). Narrowed to action-verbs + forward-looking supply-shock triggers tied to current Hormuz situation. Added match_keywords=['2026','April','May 2026','June 2026'] date filter (fed_fomc/boj pattern). Cooldown 60→120min.'

queries.query: Bank of Japan yen intervention MoF Katayama
queries.note: RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T01:05Z — Mar 13 2026 Dailyhunt Katayama-Iran-fallout 41-day archive fired on 'Katayama' solo-req kw (match_keywords ['2026','April','Apr 27','Apr 28','policy meeting'] NOT enforced by watcher per empirical evidence: prior tune 22:01 still allowed 01:02 fire). Removed bare 'Katayama'/'Akazawa'/'hike'/'decision' solo-req tokens (MoF names appear in backgrounder archives, 'hike'/'decision' too generic). Replaced with action-phrase required: 'intervene','sold yen','bought yen','rate check','urgency','excessive','surprise hike','stealth intervention','yen intervention','pain threshold','verbal intervention','sold dollars','smoothing operation'. Cooldown 180→240min. match_keywords kept for when watcher enforces them later. Re-evaluate after BoJ Apr 27-28. RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T04:35:00Z — substring-leak bug: 'Apr 20' was matching 'Apr 2026' as substring (any 2026 article passed). Switched to 'DD Mon YYYY' tokens which align with RSS pubDate format and have unique day numbers. (boj_intervention: dropped bare '2026'/'April'; kept date-precise + action phrases) | 2026-04-26T16:41Z TUNE: rolled date window +1d, added 29 Apr 2026 (BOJ T-0d, FOMC T-3d window).

TUNED 2026-05-05T06:20Z — REMOVED 'May meeting' from keywords_required (was supposed to be stripped in Apr 23 tune but was not; fired today on old 7NEWS 'hikes to 4.35%' archive via 'May meeting' match). RBA May 2026 binary CLEARED 04:30Z — no more meeting-specific triggers needed. Remaining keywords are action-phrase-only (surprise/emergency/unscheduled/cash rate raised-lowered/voted to hike-cut). Rolled match_keywords to 04-07 May 2026. RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T03:33:00Z — prior keywords ['Bullock','May meeting','surprise','unexpected'] still matched Jul 23 2025 Guardian Bullock-wary-of-cutting archive (9 months stale). STRIPPED bare 'Bullock' + single-word 'surprise'/'unexpected'.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T08:08:00Z — DROPPED 'reset' solo-kw. Chatham House Feb 17 2026 'Despite reset in India–US relations, New Delhi retains commitment to strategic hedging' (65-day archive) fired on 'reset' solo-match; match_keywords=['20 Apr 2026'...'23 Apr 2026'] date filter STILL-NOT-ENFORCED by daemon (known bug forex_news_watcher.py:246 match_keywords NEVER-ENFORCED). 'reset' is pure commentary noun — any India-US relationship article ever written matches. Kept action-specific tokens (exemption/delay/signed/retaliate/lowered/raised/executive order); even these will leak past match_keywords but are less prone to pure-backgrounder false positives. Prior: 'RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T00:03:00Z DROPPED Modi solo-kw Feb 2 80d archive. | RE-RE-TUNED 04:03 removed bare 2026. RE-TUNED 04:35 DD Mon YYYY tokens.' | 2026-04-23T20:20:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['22 Apr 2026', '23 Apr 2026', '24 Apr 2026'] (dropped Apr 20-21 stale, added Apr 24 current). Note: daemon bug forex_news_watcher.py:246 — match_keywords not enforced; cosmetic update. | 2026-04-23T21:40:00Z TUNE: rolled date window +1d (dropped Apr 22, added Apr 25). | 2026-04-24T06:00:00Z TUNE: rolled date window to ['24 Apr 2026', '25 Apr 2026', '26 Apr 2026'] (dropped 23 Apr 2026, added 26 Apr 2026). | 2026-04-26T16:41Z TUNE: rolled date window +1d, added 29 Apr 2026 (BOJ T-0d, FOMC T-3d window).
